commits.message: Impl Issue 768 Experiment 1: design Astro migration
commits.body:
Ten routes mapped, four components weighed,
A plan to turn SSR to static displayed.
TanStack bows out, Astro steps in—
Let the great migration begin.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
Fly.io served us well, a docker on the wire,
But static pages on the edge burn brighter fire.
Cloudflare's CDN spans three hundred points of light—
Time to leave the server, join the cacheable night.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.message: Close Issue 767: fix overlay titlebar offset
commits.body:
The overlay lived in NSThemeFrame,
A sibling lost, without a claim.
ContentView got placed below the bar,
But overlay stayed — a bridge too far.

Now a child of the view it serves,
Same coordinates, same gentle curves.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
The overlay thought it lived
Where the content view resides,
But NSThemeFrame had other plans—
A title bar to hide.

Six bugs deep, the coordinates were right,
The space they lived in wasn't quite.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.message: Close Issue 766: update icons with new logo
commits.body:
Third time's the charm, they say—
The logo found its final way.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.message: Close Issue 766: update icons with new logo
commits.body:
Twelve's the charm, the surf looks right,
In dock and web, a pixeled sight.
sips and Sharp both did their part—
The logo's landed, a work of art.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.message: Update dock icon with revised logo
commits.body:
The logo changed, the icon followed—
sips resized, iconutil swallowed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
The twelfth logo takes the stage,
Dock and web turn a new page.
iconutil forged the icns bright,
Sharp resized the favicon right.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
Prettier trims the extra dashes,
Tables tidy in small flashes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
Version twelve, the surf is new,
One opaque, one see-through.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
The install script copies the whole bundle—
No manual icns shuffle to fumble.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.message: Open Issue 766: update icons with new logo
commits.body:
Twelve iterations of the surf,
A logo worthy of the turf.
Dock and web shall wear it proud—
termsurf-12, fresh from the cloud.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
One byte adrift, the header lied,
The parser panicked, the pane died.
tic recompiled from source with care—
Now vim and shannon make a pair.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
The header said thirty-two,
But thirty-three was what was true.
One byte off, the parse would fail—
tic recompiled and told the tale.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
Prettier trimmed the dashes neat,
The table columns now look sweet.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
A binary rename, one byte awry,
The header lied about the name size. Why?
tic shall recompile what sed destroyed—
No more Parse errors to avoid.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
Two became one, a slash the seam,
Profile and engine share the dream.
Bottom-right, united, standing tall—
One label now to show them all.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
The profile dropped from up on high,
To join the engine down nearby.
One slash to bind them, bottom-right—
A cleaner viewport, pure delight.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
Profile up top, engine down below—
Two labels split, a scattered show.
One line to bind them, slash between,
The tidiest bottom-right you've seen.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
The profile sat up top alone,
The engine down below on its own.
Now they'll share a line, a slash between—
The neatest bottom-right you've seen.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
-p and -b, short and sweet,
Seven fewer chars to beat.
Clap derives them, clean and bright—
Two keystrokes feel just right.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
Two letters saved per flag invocation,
A micro-optimization for the nation.
-p for profile, -b for browser too—
Less typing means more time to brew.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.message: Close Issue 763: scroll on initial open
commits.body:
Two experiments walked into a bar.
The first arrived too early by far—
PaneFocused ran before the pane was made.
The second flipped a bool, and scroll obeyed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
visible: false → visible: true,
Two lines changed, the scroll breaks through.
Born seen, not hidden in the dark—
The overlay lights up from the start.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
Born visible, not born in shade—
Why start false when the pane's displayed?
SetOverlay creates what's on the screen,
So visible: true from the very first scene.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
PaneFocused ran before the pane was born,
The overlay missed the visibility horn.
Timing was off — the sync ran too soon,
The scroll still silent as the moon.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
The visible flag sat false and cold,
No PaneFocused path had made it bold.
Now sync runs on every focus change—
Scroll events no longer out of range.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
PaneFocused fires for mouse and key,
But visibility? Set only by one, you see.
Now both paths sync the visible flag—
No more scroll events left in the bag.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.message: Open Issue 763: scroll on initial open
commits.body:
The scroll was lost, the wheel spun free,
No visible flag to set it free.
Keyboard switch? It worked just fine—
Mouse click left the scroll behind.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
IndexedDB opened wide its store,
The count survived — it kept the score.
From one to two the number grew,
The storage partition pulls through.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
localStorage remembers well,
Across restarts it cast its spell.
A counter climbs from one to two—
The storage partition came through.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
Two experiments, one hard lesson learned:
The crypto delegate must be earned.
Encryption off, the cookies stay,
Logins persist beyond the day.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
Experiment 1 crashed on NOTREACHED(),
Encrypted cookies, key unbreached.
Now encryption's off, the params complete—
Cookie persistence, take two, repeat.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
The cookies sought a home on disk,
But file_paths broke the network risk.
White screens, no pages, nothing loads—
Reverted down the safer roads.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
In RAM the cookies briefly dwelt,
Each restart made the sessions melt.
file_paths now points them to the disk—
No more the ephemeral risk.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
file_paths was null,
Cookies fell into the void—
Override shall save.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
The cookies vanished every night,
No session lived to see the light.
file_paths was never set, you see—
Content shell stored them ephemerally.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
The engine spoke, the label heard,
BrowserReady carried the word.
No more blank where a name should be—
Roamium shows for all to see.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
"Who rendered me?" the viewport cried,
The engine's name it could not hide.
BrowserReady now names the guest,
And roamium shines bottom-right, impressed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
Four files, one field, problem solved—
The nameless engine gets absolved.
pane.browser was there all along,
BrowserReady just forgot the song.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
The engine hides when not named,
The bottom-right sits blank, ashamed.
BrowserReady shall confess
Which engine wears the dress.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.message: Use linked issue numbers in index
commits.body:
Seven digits, fixed and neat,
Clickable links and gf can meet.
The best of both worlds in a row—
Browser clicks AND vim can go.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.message: Use bare paths in issues index for gf
commits.body:
The link text wandered, column to column,
The cursor searched—the result was solemn.
Now paths stand still at column seven,
And gf works like keyboard heaven.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
Typing --profile every time?
That's seven extra chars—a crime!
Soon -p and -b will do the trick,
Two keystrokes: short and slick.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.message: Close Issue 759: show link URL on hover
commits.body:
Five layers deep, the hover flew,
From Blink to border — now you knew
Exactly where that link would go,
Before you clicked. The TUI told you so.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
From Blink to border, five layers crossed,
No hover URL shall again be lost.
Shell speaks, Roamium relays the news,
The TUI shows where each link pursues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
Prettier trimmed the dashes down,
Tables tidy, less to frown.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.message: Add Chromium branch to Issue 759 Exp 1
commits.body:
A branch forgot to state its name,
Now 759 can stake its claim.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
commits.author: Ryan X. Charles

commits.body:
Eleven files, five layers deep,
From Blink to border, quite a sweep.
UpdateTargetURL shall speak its name,
And bottom-left shall show the aim.
